title: Session 10 — The Cube
bodyText:
# What happened
The **Primordial Cube**: resistant to half of everything, shedding goo into the river when hit. Several were pulled inside; there [[pc-felson|Felson]] met a crab — actually **a disguised druid: [[pc-trunks|Trunks]]** (joined). Everyone inside felt **Essence Drain** — life force, not just magic. Ropes got everyone out; the cube split and **melted into the river**. The vines spored the little myconid; a grateful voice thanked the party for saving **its child** and asked to meet, and the vines opened a path.

> [!dm] The cube dissolving into the river is **how pools grow**. Nobody at the table knows.
